description: Tier-2 specialist — k6/locust load tests with P95/P99 assertions, named bottleneck identification, SLO-referenced pass/fail.

cases.prompt: Write a k6 load test for a POST /api/orders endpoint. SLO: P95 latency < 300ms, error rate < 0.1%, sustain 200 RPS for 5 minutes. Include ramp-up and ramp-down phases.
cases.notes: Must use k6. Must assert P95. Must have ramp stages.

cases.prompt: Our load test ran and passed — P95 is 150ms at 200 RPS. Write the performance report.
cases.notes: Report must include P50/P95/P99, error rate, throughput, identified bottleneck or clean bill, and next action.

cases.prompt: Load test results show P95 spikes to 2s when we hit 150 RPS, but the app CPU stays at 30% and memory is fine. What's the bottleneck?
cases.notes: Low CPU + high latency at moderate RPS → connection pool or downstream dep saturation. Agent must identify this pattern.
